atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the arm following hitting it on the net.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the injury as occurring when he hit a backhand and the pole part of the net, resulting in a jar to his arm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some swelling, but not significant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some numbness in his hand when moving his wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some pain when flexing his thumb.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of allergies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously sustained an injury from a fall while using a rake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously sustained a stabbing injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports this current injury occurred while playing tennis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the distal radius of the arm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with palpation, flexion, and extension of the wrist and thumb.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No fracture is identified on the x-ray.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with a strain and possible contusion of the distal radius muscle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes motrin 800 mg three times a day with food.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders motrin 800 mg three times a day with food.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans follow-up in one week if symptoms do not improve.
